name: Auckland
industries: Nation-scale infrastructure programmes, health technology exporters and the Wynyard Quarter tech scene drive demand.
intro: Auckland carries New Zealand's growth load: a third of the country lives here, the City Rail Link and housing programmes are the nation's largest-ever construction efforts, and the tech exporters clustered around Wynyard Quarter compete globally from a small home base. Certified project professionals are scarce enough that credentials genuinely move salaries, and both PMP and Scrum certifications are instantly understood. Batches are scheduled live online across the whole year at hours built for Auckland: a weekend Sat–Sun cohort and a weekday Wed–Thu cohort each week, all landing in comfortable local daytime; every upcoming date and its exact Auckland timing is listed in the schedule below. The format never changes: live weekend instruction, exam application support, realistic mocks, and trainer access until you're certified.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Auckland?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM AET, which is 11:00 AM – 08:00 PM GMT+12 in Auckland. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Auckland?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Auckland. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from New Zealand?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in New Zealand and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Auckland sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in New Zealand accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Auckland — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Auckland: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
